name: Instagram Growth Engine
description: A 30-day Instagram content system to grow followers, increase engagement, and drive traffic to your offer
outcome: 500+ new followers and 3–8 DM leads in 30 days

automation.action: Share to Stories with sticker CTA
automation.followUp: Reply to every comment within 1 hour to boost reach
Follow up with value piece if no reply in 3 days

assets.title: Bio Optimization Copy
assets.content:
INSTAGRAM BIO FORMULA

Line 1 — WHO YOU HELP (keyword-rich for search)
"[Job title or niche keyword] for [audience]"
Example: "Marketing Systems for Solopreneurs"

Line 2 — WHAT YOU DO / THE RESULT
"I help [audience] [achieve outcome] without [pain]"
Example: "Helping coaches get clients without ads or cold calls"

Line 3 — PROOF OR CREDIBILITY
"[Specific number] [result] | [Credential or social proof]"
Example: "50+ clients served | Featured in Forbes"

Line 4 — CTA WITH LINK
"👇 [Action word] [what they get]"
Example: "👇 Grab the free client toolkit"

---
YOUR OPTIMIZED BIO:
[Line 1]: _______________________________
[Line 2]: _______________________________
[Line 3]: _______________________________
[Line 4]: _______________________________

---
PROFILE PHOTO TIPS:
• Use a clear headshot (not a logo) — faces get 38% more engagement
• Smile, professional but approachable
• High contrast against Instagram's white background
• Consistent with your other platform photos for brand recognition

assets.title: Caption Template — Hook + Value Post
assets.content:
CAPTION TEMPLATE 1: THE VALUE DROP
(Use for educational content — performs best for saves)

[LINE 1 — SCROLL-STOPPING HOOK]
Options:
• "[Number] things nobody tells you about [topic]:"
• "Stop doing [common mistake]. Do this instead:"
• "The [topic] advice I wish I had [timeframe] ago:"

[LINES 2–8 — THE VALUE]
Keep each point short (1–2 lines max)
• Point 1: [Tip or insight]
• Point 2: [Tip or insight]
• Point 3: [Tip or insight]
(Add 3–7 points depending on content depth)

[LAST 2–3 LINES — ENGAGEMENT CTA]
"Save this for when you need it."
"Which one surprised you most? Drop it below 👇"
"Follow for more [your niche] strategies every week."

---
HASHTAGS (place in first comment or at bottom):
Mix: 3 niche hashtags + 3 medium hashtags + 3 broad hashtags
Example for solopreneurs: #solopreneur #businesstips #onlinebusiness #marketingstrategy #entrepreneurmindset #contentmarketing #digitalmarketing #smallbusiness #businessowner

assets.title: Caption Template — Story + Offer Post
assets.content:
CAPTION TEMPLATE 2: THE STORY SELL
(Use when promoting your offer — feels personal, converts well)

[LINE 1 — PERSONAL HOOK]
"[Time] ago, I was [relatable struggle]."
Example: "18 months ago, I was posting every day and getting zero clients from Instagram."

[LINES 2–5 — THE JOURNEY]
"I tried [what didn't work]."
"Then I realized [the insight]."
"So I [what you changed]."
"The result: [specific outcome]."

[LINES 6–8 — THE BRIDGE]
"Here's what I know now:"
"[Key lesson 1]"
"[Key lesson 2]"
"[Key lesson 3]"

[LINES 9–11 — SOFT CTA]
"If you're where I was — there's a way through."
"I put everything I learned into [your offer name]."
"Comment '[keyword]' or DM me and I'll send you the details."

---
PRO TIP: End with a question to boost comments:
"What's the hardest part of [topic] for you right now?"

assets.title: Reel Script Framework
assets.content:
REEL SCRIPT FRAMEWORK (30–60 second format)

SECTION 1 — HOOK (0–3 seconds, on-screen text + voiceover)
"[Bold claim or counterintuitive statement]"
Examples:
• "You don't need more followers. You need this."
• "The Instagram strategy that got me [result] in [timeframe]."
• "3 things [your audience] get wrong about [topic]."

SECTION 2 — CONTENT (4–45 seconds)
Format: Point-by-point with text overlays

Point 1: [Short title on screen]
Voiceover: "[1–2 sentence explanation]"

Point 2: [Short title on screen]
Voiceover: "[1–2 sentence explanation]"

Point 3: [Short title on screen]
Voiceover: "[1–2 sentence explanation]"

SECTION 3 — CTA (last 5–10 seconds)
"Follow for more [topic] tips every [frequency]."
"Save this — you'll want to come back to it."
"Comment '[word]' if this helped you."

---
FILMING TIPS:
• Film vertically (9:16 ratio)
• Good natural light or ring light — no dark corners
• Captions ON — 85% of Reels are watched without sound
• Trending audio = more reach (check Reels tab for audio with ↑ arrow)

assets.title: Story Sequence (5 Slides)
assets.content:
5-SLIDE STORY SEQUENCE — LEAD TO OFFER
(Use once per week to drive DMs and link clicks)

SLIDE 1 — ATTENTION
Background: Brand color or relevant image
Text: "[Question your audience is asking themselves]"
Example: "Wondering why your Instagram isn't growing?"
Add: Poll sticker "YES 🙋" / "NOT MY ISSUE"

SLIDE 2 — PROBLEM AGITATION
Text: "Most [your audience] make [X] of the same mistakes:"
• Mistake 1: [1 line]
• Mistake 2: [1 line]
• Mistake 3: [1 line]

SLIDE 3 — INSIGHT / SHIFT
Text: "Here's what changes everything:"
[Your key insight in 2–3 lines]
Add: Emoji to break up text

SLIDE 4 — PROOF
Text: "[Client result or your own result]"
"[Client name] went from [before] to [after] in [timeframe]."
Or: Screenshot of testimonial (with permission)

SLIDE 5 — CTA
Text: "Ready to [desired outcome]?"
"DM me '[keyword]' for the details."
Or: "Link in bio → [what they'll find]"
Add: Link sticker or DM sticker

---
BEST TIME TO POST STORIES: 9–11am or 7–9pm your audience's time zone

assets.title: DM Welcome Script (New Follower)
assets.content:
DM SCRIPT — WELCOME NEW FOLLOWERS
(Send within 24h of someone following you)

MESSAGE:
"Hey [First Name] 👋

Thanks for following! I noticed [something specific — they liked a post, they're in [niche], their bio mentions [X]].

I create content for [your audience description] — so you're in the right place.

Quick question: what's the #1 thing you're working on in your [business/content/niche] right now?

I ask because I share a lot of free [tips/resources/strategies] and I want to make sure what I send is actually useful for where you're at.

[Your name]"

---
FOLLOW-UP (if no reply in 3 days):
"Hey [First Name] — just wanted to share this in case it's helpful: [link to a relevant post or free resource]

No pressure — just thought of you when I posted it. Let me know if you have questions!"

---
IF THEY REPLY WITH A PROBLEM → offer to help:
"That's exactly what I focus on. I actually have [a post / a system / a resource] on this — want me to send it over?"

assets.title: Hashtag Strategy Document
assets.content:
HASHTAG STRATEGY FOR SOLOPRENEURS

THE 9-HASHTAG FORMULA (use in first comment)
Mix 3 tiers for maximum reach:

TIER 1 — NICHE HASHTAGS (under 100K posts)
3 hashtags ultra-specific to your content:
Examples: #solopreneurmarketing #coachingbusiness #freelancetips
Your 3: _________________ _________________ _________________

TIER 2 — MEDIUM HASHTAGS (100K–1M posts)
3 hashtags related to your industry:
Examples: #onlinecoach #contentcreator #digitalentrepreneur
Your 3: _________________ _________________ _________________

TIER 3 — BROAD HASHTAGS (1M+ posts)
3 high-volume hashtags for exposure:
Examples: #entrepreneur #marketing #business
Your 3: _________________ _________________ _________________

---
NEVER USE:
• Banned hashtags (check by searching — if posts say "hidden" it's banned)
• Irrelevant hashtags just because they're popular
• The same 9 hashtags on every single post (Instagram flags this)

ROTATE SETS:
Create 3–4 sets of 9 hashtags and rotate them week to week.
Save them in your notes app for quick copy-paste.

---
EXAMPLE SETS FOR SOLOPRENEURS:
Set A: #solopreneur #solopreneurlife #businessowner + #onlinebusiness #digitalmarketing #contentmarketing + #entrepreneur #marketing #success
Set B: [Create your own based on your niche]
